operational_implication: Across 854 cases and 47 (domain, round) fleets, mean synthetic inter-arrival is 1.00 days, median 1.00 days. Global arrival intensity λ≈7.117 attacks/day per fleet. Empirical 24h burst probability = 100.0%. Highest-rate domain: legal (4.824 attacks/day). Hawkes μ (baseline intensity) should be seeded near 7.117; self-excitation α should amplify only when multiple attacks arrive within <1 days.
methodology: Synthetic 1-attack-per-day arrivals within each (domain, round) fleet. Real corpus cases lack true timestamps — this assigns sequential day indices per fleet, giving a normalised inter-arrival distribution.
